text:
## Sparx Reader Settings

**Sparx Reader Points**
${userSetting.srp} SRP
> The bot will stop reading after reaching the chosen srp or when all books are finished, whichever comes first. The bot will automatically choose the next book if it finishes the book before reaching the SRP target or finishes all books in your library. The SRP target maximum is 99999.
**Words Per Minute**
${userSetting.wpm} WPM
> How fast the bot "reads". Setting it to 0 will make it complete questions as fast as possible. Recommended WPM is 300 to balance speed and reduce the risk of getting caught.
**Question Time**
${userSetting.min}-${userSetting.max} Seconds
> Question Time is how long the bot will wait for each question to simulate a realistic thinking time. Recommended time is 10-20 seconds to balance speed and avoid detection, it cannot be set above 40 otherwise the question is at risk of expiring!
